name: Legal Entity (vLEI) Present
description: Every action must carry the verifiable LEI (vLEI / AgentOwnerLEI) of the regulated entity on whose behalf the agent acts.
rationale: FIX Identity domain. GLEIF vLEI binds the legal entity at transaction time; absence is a Red hard-identity failure.
source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
